title: AI 日报 | 2026-05-18 周一 — Agent 架构大讨论
summary: Anthropic 发布 Managed Agents 大脑-双手解耦架构；AI Builder 圈全面转向 Codex；HN 热帖反思 AI 不会加速旧流程；Zerostack 纯 Rust 极简 Agent 获 529 分；OpenAI 与马耳他合作全民 ChatGPT Plus
highlights: Anthropic 发布 Managed Agents 架构：大脑与双手解耦的设计原则
AI Builder 圈 Codex 接管潮 — steipete、Dan Shipper 带头转向
HN 热帖（443pt）：AI 不会让你的流程更快，需要重新设计流程而非在旧流程上叠加 AI
Zerostack：Unix 风格的纯 Rust 编码 Agent 获 HN 529 分
OpenAI 与马耳他政府合作，全国公民免费使用 ChatGPT Plus

entries: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands — Anthropic 正式发布 Managed Agents 架构文章，阐述将 Agent 的大脑（规划、推理）与双手（执行、工具调用）解耦的设计原则 (https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/managed-agents)
Claude Code auto mode: a safer way to skip permissions — Claude Code 新增 auto mode，可在安全约束下自动跳过权限确认，减少人工打断 (https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/claude-code-auto-mode)
An update on recent Claude Code quality reports — Claude Code 4月23日质量事件的回顾与改进措施 (https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/april-23-postmortem)
AI-powered Google Finance expands to Europe — Google Finance AI 功能扩展到欧洲，AI 驱动的金融信息聚合 (https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/ai-powered-google-finance-in-europe/)
Creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses — Google 让创意大师用 AI 为小企业制作广告 (https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/company-announcements/the-small-brief/)

items.author: Garry Tan (YC President)
items.content: GBrain is free open source. MIT license. You can find it and install it in your agent with one command.

items.author: Peter Steinberger (steipete)
items.content: deslop your Claude code if you haven't yet switched to Codex. — AI Builder 圈重量级人物公开对比 Claude Code 与 Codex，推荐转向后者

items.author: Dan Shipper (Every.to CEO)
items.content: Successfully Codex-pilling the world one text at a time — Every.to CEO 持续推动 Codex 在创作者圈的采用

items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content: AI psychosis: cycling between two mental states every day — using coding agents feels omnipotent, scrolling social media makes you feel worthless. Describes the psychological whiplash of AI-augmented work

items.author: Dan Shipper (Every.to CEO)
items.content: If you use a bicycle it weakens your walking abilities, too! — 回击 AI 让人变笨的论点：工具不削弱能力，而是改变了能力的定义

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content: Advises young people against moving to venture — you need to deeply embed in a domain before you can understand what excellence means

items.author: Thariq (trq212)
items.content: HTML continues to be undefeated — 在 JS 框架泛滥的时代，纯 HTML 依然是最可靠的前端方案

items.name: Zerostack
items.description: 一个 Unix 风格的编码 Agent，使用纯 Rust 编写。遵循做一件事并做到极致的设计哲学，对比当前 Agent 框架的臃肿趋势令人耳目一新

items.title: I don't think AI will make your processes go faster
items.description: 核心论点：AI 被塞进了没有重新设计的旧流程中，所以不会加速。需要重新设计流程，让 AI 成为大脑、人成为决策者，而非在旧流程上叠加 AI

items.title: OpenAI and Government of Malta partner to roll out ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.description: 首个国家级 AI 普及案例 — OpenAI 与马耳他政府合作，全国公民免费使用 ChatGPT Plus

items.title: No Priors: Pax Silica — Inside the Trump Administration's Tech Strategy
items.description: 美国副国务卿 Jacob Helberg 讨论 Trump 政府的科技策略，涵盖芯片出口管制和 AI 地缘政治

source_info.data_sources: Anthropic Engineering Blog (3), Google AI Blog (2), X/Twitter AI Builders (11), Hacker News (3), GitHub Trending (1), No Priors Podcast (1), Stability AI Blog (2), B站 (1)
